brand.name: Building Blocks
brand.description: A dependable application shell for teams that ship serious software.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Use your work email to continue to your workspace.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Start with a secure workspace your team can grow into.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: We will send a recovery link if the address matches an account.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.description: Use at least 12 characters and avoid reused passwords.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.description: Open the verification link we sent to finish setting up your account.

invite.title: Join Acme Studio
invite.description: You have been invited to collaborate in the Product workspace.

mfa.title: Verify it is you
mfa.description: Enter the six-digit code from your authenticator app.

auth.name: Full name
auth.securityNote: Your session uses an httpOnly cookie. Access tokens are never exposed to the browser.

shell.demoBannerDescription: Changes are local and reset periodically.

dashboard.title: Good morning, Ada
dashboard.description: Here is the operating picture for Product. Everything that needs attention is collected below.
dashboard.activityDescription: Completed items across your highest-volume workflows.
dashboard.attentionDescription: Items waiting on a person or a decision.

design.title: Design system
design.description: Primitive tokens become semantic roles; components consume roles and never raw values.

search.title: Search
search.description: Find people, work, files, and settings across this workspace.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: A focused inbox for the updates that need your attention.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Keep the discussion attached to the work it belongs to.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.description: Review pending decisions and keep work moving safely.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Run and schedule exports from saved, permission-aware views.

pages.emptyDescription: This route is registered and ready for its owning module.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: The page could not be loaded. Try again, or share the correlation ID with support.
errors.notFoundDescription: The address may be outdated, or you may not have access to this workspace.
errors.forbiddenDescription: Ask an organisation owner for the permission required to view this page.
